hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Start with an empty list and an empty string

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use a repeat loop to run the right number of times

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Each time through the loop, add a star to your string, then push it to the list

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use concatenate() to add a star to the string and push() to add the string to the list
